data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: UI elements are designed to allow quick and easy access, enhancing navigation and engagement.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Reduces decision time by optimizing the number of choices presented to users.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Uses chunking to present information in digestible pieces to users.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: UI design consistency with user expectations based on experiences with other platforms.

data.title: Postel’s Law
data.description: System is designed to be tolerant of user input and errors.
